name: WebLogic honeypot
description: Low interaction honeypot to detect CVE-2017-10271 in the Oracle WebLogic Server component of Oracle Fusion Middleware. Tool: https://github.com/Cymmetria/weblogic_honeypot. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #419 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map WebLogic honeypot output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved WebLogic honeypot output file to parse instead of running it live.
